name: foundry-vtt
author: UnCorded
description: Open a Foundry VTT server from the UnCorded sidebar.

settings.label: Foundry upstream URL
settings.description: Base URL of the Foundry VTT server this plugin proxies to. Docker users can use http://host.docker.internal:30000 for local testing. Changing this invalidates the mount approval until an owner re-approves it.
